text: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 The Kuwaiti Ministry of Defence announced that its forces engaged seven hostile drones inside Kuwaiti airspace over the past 24 hours. They added that Iranian aggression also targeted several vital facilities belonging to the National Guard, injuring a number of its personnel. Their condition is stable. Serious material damage was caused. Explosive ordnance disposal teams handled 14 reports. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 科威特国防部宣布，其部队在过去24小时内拦截了七架进入科威特领空的敌方无人机。他们补充说，伊朗的侵略还针对国民警卫队的多个重要设施，造成多名人员受伤。伤者情况稳定。造成了严重的物质损失。爆炸物处理小组处理了14起报告。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYP : U.S. President Trump stated that U.S. warships are being reloaded with “the best ammunition” and “the best weapons ever made” in preparation for a possible resumption of strikes on Iran if peace talks in Pakistan fail. “We’re loading up the ships with the best weapons ever made, even at a higher level than we used to do a complete decimation,” he said, adding: “If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them, and we will be using them very effectively.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约邮报》：美国总统特朗普表示，美国军舰正在重新装载“最好的弹药”和“有史以来制造的最好的武器”，为如果巴基斯坦和平谈判失败可能恢复对伊朗的打击做准备。“我们正在为军舰装载有史以来制造的最好的武器，其水平甚至高于我们过去进行彻底摧毁时所使用的水平，”他说，并补充道：“如果我们达不成协议，我们将使用它们，而且会非常有效地使用它们。”@wfwitness

text: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ Saudi Regime Executes Citizen Over Childhood Protest Charges The Saudi regime executed Ali Hassan al-Subaiti on April 9, 2026, on fabricated “terrorism” charges dating back to when he was only 12 years old in the 2011-2012 Qatif protests. Arrested in 2017 at the age of 18 while seeking a driver’s license, he suffered 8.5 years of detention, torture, solitary confinement, and denial of legal defense. Saudi claims of joining a foreign terrorist group came with zero public proof - no documents, videos, or evidence of any kind. Rights groups say it relied only on tortured confessions from peaceful childhood protests. This is the 9th political execution in 2026 - just 8 days after Saud al-Faraj. At least 52 more remain at risk.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ 沙特政权因童年抗议指控处决公民 沙特政权于2026年4月9日处决了阿里·哈桑·阿尔-苏拜蒂（Ali Hassan al-Subaiti），罪名是其在2011-2012年卡提夫抗议活动中（当时他年仅12岁）犯下的捏造的“恐怖主义”罪行。他于2017年18岁时在申请驾照时被捕，遭受了8年半的拘留、酷刑、单独监禁和剥夺法律辩护权。沙特声称他加入了外国恐怖组织，但没有任何公开证据——没有文件、视频或任何形式的证据。人权组织表示，这仅仅依赖于在童年和平抗议期间通过酷刑获得的供词。这是2026年的第9次政治处决——距离沙特·阿尔-法拉杰（Saud al-Faraj）被处决仅8天。至少还有52人面临风险。

text: Gatherings increasing in Beirut over the Lebanese government's traitorous behavior over peace talks with Israel Even a 100 coming when the whole community is displaced is a feat in itself

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 Yep, unhinged Trump: We’re loading up the ships with the best ammunition, the best weapons ever made. If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them — and we will be using them very effectively. You’re dealing with people that we don’t know whether or not they tell the truth. To our face, they’re getting rid of all nuclear weapons… and then they go out to the press and say, ‘No, we’d like to enrich. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 是的，精神错乱的特朗普：我们正在装载最好的弹药，有史以来制造的最好的武器。如果我们达不成协议，我们将使用它们——而且会非常有效地使用它们。你面对的是一群我们不知道他们是否说真话的人。当面他们说要销毁所有核武器……然后他们跑去媒体说，‘不，我们想浓缩铀。’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: South Korea proposed a $17 billion supplementary budget to cushion the economic impact of the Iran conflict and rising oil prices. It includes cash payments to the bottom 70% of earners (about 36 million people), ranging from $65–$400 per person to offset energy and inflation costs.
text_zh: 韩国提议追加170亿美元预算，以缓解伊朗冲突和油价上涨带来的经济影响。其中包括向收入最低的70%人群（约3600万人）发放现金，每人65至400美元，以抵消能源和通胀成本。

text: Back in 2008, when Ghalibaf was mayor of Tehran, he attended the World Economic Forum in Davos to tout economic opportunities in his city. The New York Times ran a piece on him, describing him as a "presidential contender." Asked about relations with the U.S., he replied, "If the United States can change its unilateral approach and replace it with a bilateral approach, then we can have dialogue." An aide then explained to the reporter that Iran wanted the United States to treat it as an equal partner, not as a renegade nation to be brought into line. All these years later, Ghalibaf is arriving in Islamabad with the authority of a president and with a mandate to hold historic talks with the U.S.
text_zh: 早在2008年，当卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）担任德黑兰市长时，他曾参加达沃斯世界经济论坛，推销其城市的经济机会。《纽约时报》曾刊登一篇关于他的文章，称他为“总统候选人”。当被问及与美国的关系时，他回答说：“如果美国能改变其单边主义做法，代之以双边主义做法，那么我们就可以进行对话。”一位助手随后向记者解释说，伊朗希望美国将其视为平等的伙伴，而不是一个需要被驯服的叛逆国家。多年后的今天，卡利巴夫带着总统的权威抵达伊斯兰堡，并肩负着与美国进行历史性会谈的使命。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Fox: Israeli intelligence officials report that Iran is charging tolls to transit the Strait of Hormuz safely, seeking to further their control of the vital shipping route ahead of negotiations in Islamabad. "An Israeli intelligence official tells Fox News Iran is indeed demanding fees for the few vessels it's allowing to pass through the Strait Of Hormuz. This official adds the Strait is effectively under full IRGC control. They decide who gets to go through, but more importantly, who doesn't. I am told that there is intelligence being shared in the intel community about how Iran is trying to tighten its grip on this Strait ahead of the negotiations this weekend. Overnight, president Trump taking to True Social to talk about the issue saying, quote, Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable, some would say, of allowing oil to go to the straight of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have. With just eight vessels" @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 福克斯新闻：以色列情报官员报告称，伊朗正在对安全通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取通行费，试图在伊斯兰堡谈判前进一步加强对这一重要航道的控制。“一位以色列情报官员告诉福克斯新闻，伊朗确实在对其允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的少数船只收取费用。这位官员补充说，该海峡实际上处于伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的完全控制之下。他们决定谁可以通过，更重要的是，谁不能通过。我被告知，情报界正在分享关于伊朗如何试图在周末谈判前收紧对该海峡控制的情报。昨晚，特朗普总统在“真实社交”（True Social）上谈到这个问题时说，引用：伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，有些人会说是可耻的。那不是我们达成的协议。只有八艘船。” @wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 NEW: Iran has rebuilt Yahyabad railway bridge in Kashan, after it was bombed by Israel on April 7th Reconstruction efforts around the country, especially of vital infrastructure, are progressing at a rapid pace. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 新消息：伊朗已重建卡尚（Kashan）的亚赫亚巴德（Yahyabad）铁路桥，该桥于4月7日被以色列轰炸。全国各地的重建工作，特别是重要基础设施的重建，正在快速推进。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️A Hezbullah drone attack today severely injured one Jewish soldier and another soldier moderately." It was my darling the FPV against a Humvee 😮‍💨
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“❗️真主党今天的一次无人机袭击严重炸伤了一名犹太士兵，另一名士兵中度受伤。” 是我的宝贝FPV击中了悍马车 😮‍💨

text: Trump considered firing Tulsi Gabbard after being frustrated with her less supportive stance on the Iran War. He even questioned her loyalty in private and began asking advisers whether she should be replaced. However, longtime ally Roger Stone stepped in and persuaded him to keep her, arguing that she had been loyal, didn’t deserve to be fired, and that removing her could create bad press and even boost her as a potential political rival. Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普曾考虑解雇图尔西·加巴德（Tulsi Gabbard），因为他对她在伊朗战争问题上不够支持的态度感到沮丧。他甚至私下质疑她的忠诚度，并开始询问顾问是否应该更换她。然而，长期盟友罗杰·斯通（Roger Stone）介入并说服他留下了她，理由是她一直很忠诚，不应该被解雇，而且解雇她可能会造成负面新闻，甚至可能使她成为潜在的政治对手。来源：Axios

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Preliminary reports that 8 state security officials have been killed in the Israeli attack on a governmental institution in Nabatieh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese General Directorate of State Security announces the death of 13 members as a result of the targeting of the Nabatieh Government Serail building. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 初步报告称，8名国家安全官员在以色列对黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰一处政府机构的袭击中丧生。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩国家安全总局宣布，由于纳巴泰政府大楼遭到袭击，13名成员死亡。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to The War Reporter: "🇰🇼🇮🇷 — Kuwaiti Army says it has dealt with 7 Iranian drone attacks over the past 24 hours."The attacks targeted several vital facilities affiliated with the National Guard, resulting in injuries among some of its members," the statement added."
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 The War Reporter：“🇰🇼🇮🇷 — 科威特军方称，在过去24小时内处理了7起伊朗无人机袭击。”声明补充说：“袭击针对了国民警卫队下属的几个重要设施，导致其部分成员受伤。”

text: 🇮🇹 Italian Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani said he spoke to the Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and expressed solidarity for the “unjustified and unacceptable attacks he is suffering from Israel.” “We want to avoid there being a second Gaza. We will reiterate this concept to the Israeli Ambassador as well, whom I have summoned to the Farnesina. We condemn the bombings on the Lebanese civilian population, including the gunfire incidents suffered by our UNIFIL [UN Interim Force in Lebanon] troops, for which we continue to demand guarantees of total safety. We must absolutely avoid any further expansion of the conflict that would jeopardise the ceasefire in Iran and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz,” Tajani added. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇹 意大利外交部长安东尼奥·塔亚尼（Antonio Tajani）表示，他与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩进行了交谈，并对“他所遭受的来自以色列的不公正和不可接受的袭击”表示声援。“我们希望避免黎巴嫩出现第二个加沙。我们将向我也已传唤到法尔内西纳（Farnesina，意大利外交部）的以色列大使重申这一概念。我们谴责对黎巴嫩平民的轰炸，包括我们的联黎部队（UNIFIL）士兵遭受的枪击事件，我们继续要求对这些事件提供绝对安全的保证。我们必须绝对避免冲突的任何进一步扩大，这将危及伊朗的停火和霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放，”塔亚尼补充道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "Aoun, the president, their commander issued a very shy and weak statement on the matter" Maybe because the majority of them where Muslim Shia and not as important as a water pipe in a Christian town
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“奥恩，总统，他们的指挥官就此事发表了一份非常害羞和软弱的声明” 也许是因为他们中的大多数是什叶派穆斯林，不像基督教城镇的水管那么重要

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇸🇮❌🇮🇱 Slovenia joins Spain’s effort to suspend the EU–Israel Association Agreement. ℹ️The EU–Israel Association Agreement is a treaty between the European Union and Israel that sets the terms for their trade, political cooperation, and broader relations.…" 🇪🇸 In a post on X, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said Netanyahu’s “contempt for life and international law is intolerable” in light of the attacks. “It’s time to speak clearly: – Lebanon must be included in the ceasefire. – The international community must condemn this new violation of international law. – The European Union must suspend its Association Agreement with Israel. – And there must be no impunity for these criminal acts,” Sanchez said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇸🇮❌🇮🇱 斯洛文尼亚加入西班牙的行列，寻求暂停《欧盟-以色列联系国协议》。ℹ️《欧盟-以色列联系国协议》是欧盟与以色列之间的一项条约，规定了双方贸易、政治合作和更广泛关系的条款……” 🇪🇸 在X上的一篇帖子中，首相佩德罗·桑切斯表示，鉴于这些袭击，内塔尼亚胡对“生命和国际法的蔑视是不可容忍的”。“是时候明确表态了：– 黎巴嫩必须被纳入停火协议。– 国际社会必须谴责这种新的违反国际法的行为。– 欧盟必须暂停与以色列的联系国协议。– 这些犯罪行为绝不能逍遥法外，”桑切斯说。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的纳哈里亚（Nahariya）及周边地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Iranian Parliament speaker Ghalibaf reports that the only two things not mutually agreed upon with the U.S. is including Lebanon in the ceasefire and releasing frozen Iranian assets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫报告称，与美国未达成共识的两件事是：将黎巴嫩纳入停火协议以及释放被冻结的伊朗资产。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ 13 members of the Lebanese state Security force who operate under the command of the Lebanese president have been killed in an Israeli attack on their well known building near the Lebanese Government HQ in Nabatieh Aoun, the president, their commander issued a very shy and weak statement on the matter He continues to view their blood as mere noise in the path to normalize with Israel and suck up to his patrons in the U.S administration
text_zh: ❗️ 13名在黎巴嫩总统指挥下工作的黎巴嫩国家安全部队成员在以色列对纳巴泰黎巴嫩政府总部附近的一座知名建筑的袭击中丧生。奥恩，总统，他们的指挥官就此事发表了一份非常害羞和软弱的声明。他继续将他们的鲜血视为与以色列关系正常化并讨好他在美国政府中的赞助人的道路上的噪音

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Zelensky, being the shyster he is, keeps selling "Ukrainian AD capabilities" to the GCC states. But there is a nuance... To Ukrainian mobile fire teams: if your radio isn’t calling “Volga,” you’re considered a priority target. Video: @stalins_sokol 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 泽连斯基作为一个骗子，一直在向海湾合作委员会国家兜售“乌克兰防空能力”。但有一个细微差别……对乌克兰移动火力小组：如果你的无线电没有呼叫“伏尔加”（Volga），你就会被视为优先目标。视频：@stalins_sokol 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 Zionist Army Radio: Hezbollah has fired more than 30 rockets towards the northern occupied territories since this morning.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 犹太复国主义军队电台：自今天早上以来，真主党已向北部被占领土发射了30多枚火箭弹。

text: ELINT News RT @Osinttechnical : Ukrainian specialists shot down Iranian Shahed attack drones across several Middle Eastern countries during the Iran War -President Zelensky The teams also directly integrated into Gulf countries' air defense systems, providing them with Ukrainian battle experience. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042494723441492164/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @Osinttechnical：乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，在伊朗战争期间，乌克兰专家在中东多个国家击落了伊朗的“见证者”（Shahed）攻击无人机。这些团队还直接整合到海湾国家的防空系统中，为他们提供了乌克兰的战斗经验。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042494723441492164/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Trump administration is expected to demand the release of at least six American citizens held in Iran as part of the negotiations. - Washington Post tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 预计特朗普政府将在谈判中要求释放至少六名被关押在伊朗的美国公民。- 《华盛顿邮报》推文

text: WarTranslated Zelensky confirmed for the first time that Ukrainian forces shot down Shaheds in the Middle East during the US-Israel war with Iran. He said it was not a training mission but actual combat using Ukrainian-made interceptor drones. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基首次证实，在美国-以色列与伊朗的战争期间，乌克兰军队在中东击落了“见证者”无人机。他说这不是训练任务，而是使用乌克兰制造的拦截无人机进行的实际战斗。推文

text: Open Source Intel CNN REPORT: U.S. President Donald Trump had a “tense” phone call with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, according to U.S. and Israeli sources familiar with the conversation. The call reportedly came shortly before Israel announced steps toward direct ceasefire talks with Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel CNN报道：据熟悉谈话的美国和以色列消息人士称，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普与总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡进行了“紧张”的通话。据报道，这次通话发生在以色列宣布采取与黎巴嫩进行直接停火谈判的步骤前不久。推文

text: Open Source Intel Spain’s PM Sánchez says the country is ready to move toward a joint European army, “even tomorrow if needed.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042617589558317154/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 西班牙首相桑切斯表示，该国准备迈向建立一支联合欧洲军队，“如果需要，明天就可以。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042617589558317154/photo/1 推文
